final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
            if (count == 4'b1111) begin
                count <= 4'b0;
            end
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
      if (count == 4'b0) begin
        count <= 4'b1111;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
